parts.answer: triangle method indicated on graph triangle at least half of candidate’s line 2 or 3 significant figures and unit N

Difficulty in achieving exact balance OR difficulty in judging centre of P OR load easily slips OR top of pivot not a sharp edge Statement and explanation to match results. Expect Yes, because values are close, owtte 0625/61 May/June 2019 I = 0.47(A) V / l 0.025 0.023 0.027 0.026 0.024 V / l consistent 2 significant figures or consistent 3 significant figures V/cm

Box 1 ticked Values are close OR values are within the limits of experimental accuracy 2 or 3 significant figures Unit Ω OR switch off between readings 0625/61 May/June 2019 (°C) °C seen and not contradicted Third box ticked to match readings Pairs of readings 94(°C), 89(°C) and 93 (°C), 87 (°C) quoted. OR differences 5(°C) and 6(°C) quoted Difference is only 1(°C) OR difference is small. owtte Use a black painted beaker (and black painted can) Use a shiny can (and unpainted beaker) Any two from: Room temperature Volume of water Same starting temperature (of water)

Perpendicular viewing of the thermometer OR stirring OR thermometer not touching beaker. 0625/61 May/June 2019 MP1 Apparatus: Forcemeter/Newtonmeter or pulley and weights arrangement MP2 Method: Pull box up slope, measure force and measure distance moved MP3 Method: Repeat with different masses MP4 Variable: Angle of slope or height of blocks MP5 Variable: Distance moved MP6 Table to include columns for mass and force, both with unit (g or kg for mass and N for force) MP7 Calculate work done and compare with mass. OR Compare work done with mass (if there is a work done column in the table). OR Plot graph of work done against mass
